title: IUT Evidence Record
description: A bibliographic evidence record (paper, blog post, talk, formalization project, book).

archive_url.description: Wayback Machine (or other archival) snapshot URL for the primary `url`. Optional in v0.7.0 (population follow-up); v0.7.x must-band #6 will require Paper / Blog / Book records to carry an archive_url so that Round-6-class content drift can be detected post-hoc.
